description: Helpdesk, live chat, and customer support ticketing tools for product and engineering teams.

entries.name: Crisp
entries.summary: Live chat, shared inbox, and basic CRM for small support teams.
entries.freeTier: Free plan for up to 2 seats with core chat features.

entries.name: Tawk.to
entries.summary: Free live chat widget and ticketing system with unlimited agents and chat history.
entries.freeTier: 100% free for unlimited agents and chat volume.
entries.paidFrom: Add-ons (e.g., remove branding, hire chat agents) are paid.

entries.name: Chatwoot
entries.summary: Open-source customer engagement platform (live chat, omnichannel inbox), self-hostable or managed cloud.
entries.freeTier: Self-hosted fully free; Cloud free tier for small teams.

entries.name: Freshdesk
entries.summary: Helpdesk and ticketing system with automation, SLAs, and a knowledge base builder.
entries.freeTier: Free plan for up to 10 agents with core ticketing.

entries.name: Zendesk
entries.summary: Enterprise-grade customer service platform covering ticketing, chat, and a help center.
entries.freeTier: N/A — no perpetual free tier, trial only.

entries.name: Papercups
entries.summary: Open-source live customer chat platform, an Intercom alternative you can self-host.
